title: Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani)
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices.
Make sauce with butter, tomato, ginger-garlic.
Add chicken to sauce and serve.

reviews.text: Restaurant quality! I used coconut milk instead of heavy cream for a lighter version. Added a pinch of kasuri methi (dried fenugreek) at the end.
Delicious! Added extra garam masala and a dash of cream at the end. Served over basmati rice with naan.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
